patch.value: Unify plugin/MCP naming: pm-cli-claude→pm-claude, pm-cli-codex→pm-codex, pm-cli-native MCP→pm-mcp, packages @unbrained/pm-package-X→@unbrained/pm-X

Rename for consistent `pm-`-prefixed branding across the repo. MCP server pm-cli-native renamed to pm-mcp (src/mcp/server.ts:560, all .mcp.json files, contract test, docs). Plugin directories renamed via git mv: plugins/pm-cli-claude→plugins/pm-claude, plugins/pm-cli-codex→plugins/pm-codex. Plugin names in plugin.json: pm-cli→pm-claude (Claude), pm-cli-codex→pm-codex (Codex). Marketplace plugin name: pm-cli→pm-claude. Local marketplace name pm-cli-local→pm-local. All 8 packages: @unbrained/pm-package-X→@unbrained/pm-X. Plugin versions bumped to force cache refresh: Claude 1.3.0→1.4.0, Codex 1.0.0→1.1.0, marketplace 1.3.0→1.4.0.

All MCP server registrations use 'pm-mcp'; all plugin dirs and plugin names use pm-claude/pm-codex; all packages use @unbrained/pm-X; marketplace name normalised to pm-local where applicable; full test suite green; smoke tests for both plugins pass; plugin version bumped so existing users pick up rename on next plugin update.
